stats.changes: No changes since we didn't start the program yet.
stats.lessons: Next biweek will get all details finished for the first rewards distribution for LPs.

actuals.summary:
Jun11: First 50k ARB were claimed.
LP incentives: 
- progressed on planning sessions on pool incentives
- changes in TVL and the incentives overall value -> we had rework pools and objectives.
Lending protocols:
- working on tBTC integration into GMX, they will coincentivize with Threshold
Minting Dashboard:
June15: Development work kickoff
actuals.disclosures:
- New 2BTC Curve Pool was deployed from Curve Team which will get incentivized by Threshold.
- Uniswap V3 pools (TBTC/ETH and TBTC/WBTC) will get incentivized by Threshold.

planned.changes:
Liquidity Pools:	
- still working on incentives distribution mechanics
- switched Balancer pools to UniV3 for better liquidity deployment
- Dune dashboard work in progress (https://dune.com/lrsaturnino/tbtc-on-arbitrum)

Lending Protocols:	- working on tBTC integration into GMX, they will coincentivize with Threshold
Minting Dashboard:	- Development work started
Long term LP:	- working on the implementation of this program (rules and marketing)
planned.expectations: We're planning to start rewards distribution for LP before next biweek.

stats.changes:
As stated on the In-progress Disclosure, we plan following Grant ARB distribution :
Total Voted Grant: 300,000 ARB

Distribution as per proposal: 
200,000 ARB for Liquidity Pools incentives
 -> are being distributed each period to the Curve/Merkl contracts

20,000 ARB for Lending Protocols incentives
-> will be distributed once GMX onboards tBTC

30,000 ARB -> Minting Portal Dev
-> will be sent to the Threshold Integrations Guild Multisig, which handles development payments (we'll disclose multisig address next week)

50,000 ARB -> will be kept here (Threshold LTIPP multisig) until the long term loyalty program finishes, then will be airdropped to users.
stats.lessons:
Comments on Statistics:
Avg Daily TVL: sum of the three incentivized pools (Curve 2BTC-ng, UniV3 tBTC-ETH and UniV3 tBTC-WBTC)
Avg Daily Tx: this statistic will reflect Avg daily Volume, which is a much more meaningful statistic to evaluate tBTC performance.
Avg Daily Unique Users: n/a yet.

Lessons learned:
- We'll adjust execution plans accounting for operational times (multisig signing).
- GMX onboarding takes longer than expected, but snapshot is planned for next week.

stats.changes:
In order to have an even distribution on Curve Pools we switched to weekly deposits of ARB incentives.
On Merkl we deposit all remaining ARB incentives with programming even disbursement throughout the rest of the 12week periods.

Lending Protocols:GMX tBTC onboarding process advances,  voting was completed.
Long Term loyalty program: work on implementation advanced
Minting Portal: milestones progress is firm

grantSummary:
Threshold DAO will launch a “Bitcoin on Arbitrum Season” campaign with the launch of grant incentives deployment. The campaign will have 4 parts :

- Liquidity incentives with the grant for liquidity providers and tBTC users 
- Incentives for tBTC use on Lending Protocols
- Direct tBTC Minting on Arbitrum Dashboard: Bitcoin to Arbitrum
- Long term incentives : A loyalty program to incentivize both long-term participation and substantial liquidity contribution
